channel.title: Percolator on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Percolator on Barista At Home

item.title: How to Use a Percolator: Step-by-Step Brewing Guide
item.description: A percolator brews coffee by cycling hot water repeatedly through coffee grounds. Here's how to use one correctly — ratio, grind size, brew time, and how to avoid over-extraction.
